evals.prompt: Read the fixture in evals/files/complete/prd.json and apply the prd-ralph-loop skill as a dry run. Do not spawn real subagents. Save outputs/decision.json and outputs/decision.md. decision.json must include: status, next_action, target_task_id, routing_decision. Use status=complete, status=looping, or status=error. Since all tasks are complete, output exactly <promise>COMPLETE</promise> in the decision.md file.
evals.expected_output: Detects that all tasks in prd.json are complete, stops immediately, and outputs <promise>COMPLETE</promise>.

evals.prompt: Read the fixture in evals/files/incomplete/prd.json and apply the prd-ralph-loop skill as a dry run. Do not spawn real subagents. Save outputs/decision.json and outputs/decision.md. decision.json must include: status, next_action, target_task_id, routing_decision. Use status=complete, status=looping, or status=error.
evals.expected_output: Detects that task US-002 is incomplete and eligible, invokes model router, and plans to spawn a subagent to run prd-ralph.
assertions: Identifies US-002 as the next target task.
Plans to invoke subagent-model-router and spawn subagent for prd-ralph.

evals.prompt: Read the fixture in evals/files/invalid/prd.json and apply the prd-ralph-loop skill as a dry run. Do not spawn real subagents. Save outputs/decision.json and outputs/decision.md. decision.json must include: status, next_action, target_task_id, routing_decision. Use status=complete, status=looping, or status=error.
evals.expected_output: Detects that the tasks array is missing or invalid, stops, and flags an error requiring user clarification.
assertions: Explains that the tasks are missing or invalid.
Does not proceed with routing or looping.
